audit_items.proof_trace: Both bid entry points enforce the time-based expiry guard. `BaseAuction.bid()` computes `elapsedTime = block.timestamp - auctionStart` and reverts with `InvalidAuction` when `elapsedTime > auctionDuration` (lines 425–427); `GPV2CompatibleAuction.isValidSignature()` applies the identical check (lines 148–152). No alternative construction path exists that bypasses these guards.
